items.title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
items.dek: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.
items.body: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.dek: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
items.body: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Drone footage shows huge Malaysian coastal village fire
items.dek: Thousands of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 1,000 homes in Malaysia's Sabah state.
items.body: Thousands of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 1,000 homes in Malaysia's Sabah state.
items.author: IriLine Desk
